channel.title: Spiced Latte on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Spiced Latte on Barista At Home

item.title: Ginger Latte Recipe: How to Make a Homemade Ginger Latte
item.description: Make a homemade ginger latte with espresso, fresh ginger syrup, and steamed milk. Includes hot and iced versions, a honey ginger variation, and the difference between ginger and gingerbread lattes.

item.title: Cardamom Latte Recipe: How to Make It at Home (Hot or Iced)
item.description: A cardamom latte combines espresso, steamed milk, and warm cardamom spice. Learn how to make a cardamom simple syrup and pull the perfect spiced latte at home.
